description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the starter plans, filter to options under $150 that include 1-on-1 coaching and at least 5 training modules, then choose the cheapest one and begin the sign-up process using your contact details.

tasks.instruction: Within the next 14 days, find a weekday evening introductory overview webinar and register for the earliest available one using the specified registration details.
tasks.name: Within the next 14 days, find a weekday evening introductory overview webinar and register for the earliest available one using the specified registration details.

tasks.instruction: Use the earnings calculator to configure and save an earnings plan that estimates at least $2,000 in monthly income, entering the requested contact details when saving.
tasks.name: Use the earnings calculator to configure and save an earnings plan that estimates at least $2,000 in monthly income, entering the requested contact details when saving.

tasks.instruction: From the programs list, filter to options requiring no more than 10 hours per week with at least 3 live group sessions per month, then favorite the one with the highest average monthly earnings and create a basic account to save it.

tasks.instruction: In the success stories, filter to parents earning at least $2,500 per month while working roughly 20–30 hours per week, then open the most recent story and save it to a reading list using the guest option.

target_names: From Naptime Experiments to a Steady $2,700/Month

tasks.instruction: From the main landing page, open the application form, choose a part-time availability option, set a maximum monthly budget of $300, select a preferred start date in April 2026, pick exactly two interest areas (Email Marketing and Affiliate Sales), and submit the application with your contact details and goal statement.

expected_values.goal_text: I want to replace at least half of my current income within 12 months.

tasks.name: From the main landing page, open the application form, choose a part-time availability option, set a maximum monthly budget of $300, select a preferred start date in April 2026, pick exactly two interest areas (Email Marketing and Affiliate Sales), and submit the application with your contact details and goal statement.
tasks.description: From the main landing page, open the application form, choose a part-time availability option, set a maximum monthly budget of $300, select a preferred start date in April 2026, pick exactly two interest areas (Email Marketing and Affiliate Sales), and submit the application with your contact details and goal statement.

tasks.instruction: On the newsletter preferences page, subscribe with a weekly summary delivered in the morning, selecting only Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy as topics, enabling tips and tutorials but not product announcements, and then submit the form with your name and email.

tasks.instruction: Use the FAQ search for refund-related information, open the article that explains the 30-day money-back guarantee, then use its contact link to send a billing question asking to extend the guarantee to 60 days, including your name and email.

expected_values.contact_message: I see that you offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Is it possible to extend this guarantee to 60 days for the work-from-home program I am considering?
